<!--
Title: one plain sentence describing the outcome, e.g. "Surface links on
SKIM items". Write for a reviewer deciding whether to merge: plain
sentences, no shorthand, no undefined abbreviations. The reader did not
watch the session that produced this change.
Delete these comments before submitting.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What changed and why. -->
-

## Risk

<!-- Required. What could break, what is hard to reverse, what you are
unsure of — digest formatting regressions, the cron timeout budget
(Vercel Hobby, 60 seconds), capture-pipeline changes that affect
already-queued items. Do not bury this in Summary bullets. If none,
write "No significant risk" and say in one line why. -->
-

## Verification

<!-- [x] with counts, e.g. `npm test — 25 passed`, typecheck and lint,
plus any live check against production or queued items. Use [ ] for
steps still to do. -->
- [ ]

## Decision needed

<!-- Optional — include only when the reviewer must decide something
beyond "merge": an open question, a trade-off that could have gone
another way, or scope deliberately left out. Otherwise delete. -->
